title: NASA’s Webb Studies How Planet Survived Death of its Star
summary: This article discusses the discovery of an exoplanet WD 1856 b, which defies scientific expectations by surviving despite being in a close orbit to its white dwarf host star. This unique planet's survival and its relationship to stars like our Sun sheds light on the future of planets after the death of their sun.
script:
이제 진짜 믿기지 않는 이야기를 들어보세요!
왜 이러한 별들이 우주를 변화시켰을까요?
우리 주변의 행성과 별은 아무도 알아봤는가? 
James Webb Space Telescope에 의해 새로운 정보를 얻었어요!
